sectors.news_driver: Maruti Suzuki's 19% sales jump in June

stocks.name: Maruti Suzuki
stocks.reason: June sales data showing 19% growth -> indicating strong demand and pricing power -> driving revenue growth of 15-18% in Q1

stocks.name: Hyundai Motor India
stocks.reason: June sales missing estimates -> suggesting weak demand and competitive pressure -> impacting revenue growth by -5% in Q1

sectors.news_driver: Jefferies' upgrade of Maruti Suzuki to Buy

stocks.name: Maruti Suzuki
stocks.reason: Jefferies' upgrade to Buy -> increasing investor confidence and buying interest -> driving stock price up by 5-7%

stocks.name: RITES
stocks.reason: Rs 175 crore consultancy order -> increasing order book and revenue visibility -> driving revenue growth of 20-25% in FY24

sectors.news_driver: GST mop up growth of 14% in June

stocks.name: Kajaria Ceramics
stocks.reason: GST mop up growth of 14% -> indicating stable consumer demand -> supporting Kajaria Ceramics' revenue growth of 8-10% in Q1
